sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse - столбцовая система управления базами данных'), (2, 'This is a test string'), (3, 'System check');
SELECT id, hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitiveUTF8(description, 'система') AS subsequence_check FROM test_strings WHERE hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitiveUTF8(description, 'СИСТЕМА') > 0;
SELECT a.id, b.description FROM test_strings AS a JOIN test_strings AS b ON hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitiveUTF8(a.description, b.description) > 0 WHERE a.id > (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_strings) - 2;
SELECT id, hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitiveUTF8(description, '') AS empty_check FROM test_strings HAVING empty_check > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY num;
SELECT num, (num > 25) AS is_greater FROM test_numbers WHERE hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitiveUTF8(CAST(num AS String), '20') > 0;
SELECT id, description FROM test_strings WHERE description LIKE '%test%' AND hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitiveUTF8(description, 'TEST') > 0;
SELECT SUM(num) AS total FROM test_numbers WHERE hasSubsequenceCaseInsensitiveUTF8('value: ' || CAST(num AS String), 'value: 30') > 0;
